name: DMR Danish Glossary
description: Activate when DMR tool output or user questions contain Danish registry labels, camel-cased live inspection outcome labels (KanGodkendesVedOmsynAf..., IkkeGodkendt), vehicle types, registration statuses, fuel types, body styles, colour names, usage categories, permit types, emission labels, or any Danish technical vehicle registry term needing English explanation.

referenced_content.name: glossary
referenced_content.content:
VEHICLE TYPES
Personbil = passenger car
Varebil = light commercial van
Lastbil = heavy goods truck
Motorcykel = motorcycle
Knallert = moped
Campingvogn = caravan/trailer
Påhængsredskab = towed implement

REGISTRATION STATUS
Registreret = currently registered (active)
Afmeldt = deregistered (no longer active)
Midlertidigt afmeldt = temporarily deregistered

FUEL TYPES
Benzin = petrol/gasoline
Diesel = diesel
El = fully electric (battery electric vehicle)
El/benzin = plug-in hybrid (electric + petrol)
Brint = hydrogen fuel cell
Gas = LPG (liquefied petroleum gas)
Andre = other/alternative fuel

BODY STYLES
Sedan = saloon/sedan
Stationcar = estate car/station wagon
Hatchback = hatchback
Cabriolet = convertible/drop-top
Coupe = coupé
MPV = minivan/people carrier
SUV = sport utility vehicle
Limousine = stretched limousine
Vinduer rundt = panoramic/all-round windows body

INSPECTION OUTCOMES
Godkendt = passed inspection (approved)
KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfOmsynsvirksomhed = conditionally approved — must pass re-inspection at an approved re-inspection body
KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfSynsvirksomhed = conditionally approved — must pass re-inspection at an approved inspection station
IkkeGodkendt = failed inspection (not approved)
IkkeGodkendtKanGenfremstilles = failed inspection, eligible for re-presentation
IkkeFuldstaendigtSyn = incomplete inspection (not fully assessed)
Betinget godkendt = old human-readable label for conditional — no longer appears in live data
Afvist = old human-readable label for failed — no longer appears in live data
Godkendt med anmærkning = passed with advisory note
Synsfri = exempt from periodic inspection

COLOURS
Hvid = white
Sort = black
Grå = grey
Sølv = silver
Blå = blue
Rød = red
Grøn = green
Brun = brown / bronze
Gul = yellow
Orange = orange
Lilla / Violet = purple / violet
Beige = beige
Ukendt = unknown / not recorded (not a real colour)

USAGE CATEGORIES
Privat personkørsel = private passenger use
Taxikørsel = taxi/hire service
Udlejning Uden Fører = self-drive rental (car hire without driver)
Mandskabs-/Materielkørsel = crew/equipment transport
Kørsel for offentlig myndighed = government/official transport
Ambulancekørsel = ambulance service
Beredskabskørsel = emergency/fire service
Limousinekørsel = limousine service
Linjerutefart = scheduled route service (bus-like)
Beboelse = residential/mobile home use
Særlig anvendelse = special application
Rustvognskørsel = hearse service
Sygetransport = patient transport
Brandsluknings-/redningskørsel = fire/rescue service
Rutekørsel = scheduled route service
Godstransport = goods transport

PERMIT TYPES
Synsfri Sammenkobling = inspection-free towing coupling permit (towing device exempted from periodic inspection)
Veterankørsel = veteran vehicle permit (for eligible pre-1977 vehicles)
Chiptuning Godkendt = approved engine chip-tuning permit
Taxi-tilladelse = taxi operating licence
Øvelseskørsel = learner-driver practice permit
Stelnummer Genihugget = chassis number re-stamped permit (re-identification)
Udrykningskørsel = emergency vehicle permit
Tempo 100 = speed-limit-100 trailer permit
Fast Tilkobling = fixed coupling permit
Variabel Kombination = variable combination permit
Midlertidigt Godkendt = temporarily approved
Nedvejet = reduced weight rating permit
Miljøvenlig = environmentally friendly vehicle permit

TECHNICAL TERMS
Køreklar vægt = kerbweight (unladen weight ready to drive)
Totalvægt = gross vehicle weight (max laden weight)
Tilkoblingsvægt = towing capacity
Tilkoblingsvægt med bremser = braked towing capacity
Tilkoblingsvægt uden bremser = unbraked towing capacity
Traekkendeaksler = driven axles (1 = single-axle drive FWD/RWD, 2 = all-wheel drive AWD/4WD)
StelNummer = chassis number / VIN
Nummerplade = licence plate / registration number
Effekt = engine power output
Slagvolumen = engine displacement
Cylinderantal = cylinder count
Maksimumhastighed = certified top speed
Trafikskade = traffic accident damage flag (boolean — TRUE means a traffic-damage event was recorded; NOT a type-approval flag and NOT similar to taxi_suitable / NCAP)

WRITE-OFF / SALVAGE / BLOCK-REASON VOCABULARY (`blocking_reason` field, KoeretoejBlokeringAarsagTypeNavn)
Totalskadet køretøj = totally damaged vehicle / write-off / total loss / salvage (~562k cars — almost all deregistered)
Totalskadet = singular indefinite form of write-off (one car is totalskadet)
Totalskadede = plural definite form — totalskadede cars = the written-off cars / the write-offs (NOT a contraction of "total" — when a user asks about "totalskadede" they want write-offs, not totals)
Skadet køretøj = damaged vehicle (~21k cars — partial damage, distinct from total loss)
Skadet = damaged (singular)
Skadede = damaged (plural definite)
Mangel = defect / fault (~20k cars — administrative defect-blocking, distinct from damage)
Manglende = lacking / missing (the same root word)
Køretøjet er blokeret = vehicle is blocked (~12k cars — generic administrative block)
Indkaldt til registrering = summoned for registration (~531 cars)
Henvist til SKAT = referred to the tax authority (~172 cars)

English aliases the agent should map to the above:
  write-off / write-offs / written-off → Totalskadet køretøj
  total loss / total losses → Totalskadet køretøj
  salvage / salvaged → Totalskadet køretøj
  damaged / damage record → Skadet køretøj (partial) or Totalskadet (total) depending on severity
  defect / fault → Mangel
  blocked → Køretøjet er blokeret
NCAP-test = Euro NCAP crash safety test rating
Leasingaftale = leasing contract
VeteranKoeretoej = veteran vehicle (registry flag, typically 35+ years old and largely original)
Emissionsnorm = emission standard (Euro 1–6)
Partikelfilterkode = diesel particle filter code

content:
Load this skill when:
- A Danish registry label appears in tool output and needs to be explained in English
- A user asks what a Danish DMR term means
- Translating inspection outcomes, usage categories, permit types, or vehicle types

Search the glossary section for the term and provide the English equivalent. If the term is not found, say it is not a standard DMR registry category and offer to search for it in the data.
